<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1">
<title>Jory Castro Rodríguez · Dev Girl 🌸</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@300;400;600;700&family=DM+Mono:wght@300;400;500&family=Pacifico&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root{
  --pink:#E4007C;--pink2:#ff69b4;--pink3:#ffb3d9;--pink4:#fff0f6;
  --dark:#0d0015;--dark2:#1a0030;--dark3:#2d0050;
  --white:#ffffff;
}
*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;scroll-behavior:smooth;}
body{font-family:'Quicksand',sans-serif;background:var(--dark);color:var(--white);overflow-x:hidden;cursor:none;}

/* CURSOR PERSONALIZADO */
.cursor{position:fixed;width:12px;height:12px;background:var(--pink);border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none;z-index:9999;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);transition:transform .1s;mix-blend-mode:difference;}
.cursor-ring{position:fixed;width:36px;height:36px;border:1.5px solid var(--pink3);border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none;z-index:9998;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);transition:all .15s ease;opacity:.6;}

/* BOOT SCREEN */
#boot{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;background:var(--dark);z-index:1000;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:opacity .8s ease;}
#boot.hidden{opacity:0;pointer-events:none;}
.boot-logo{font-family:'Pacifico',cursive;font-size:52px;color:var(--pink);text-shadow:0 0 40px rgba(228,0,124,.6);margin-bottom:1rem;animation:pulse 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;}
.boot-sub{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:13px;color:var(--pink3);margin-bottom:2.5rem;letter-spacing:.2em;}
.boot-log{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;color:var(--pink2);text-align:left;width:320px;min-height:100px;margin-bottom:1.5rem;}
.boot-log p{margin:3px 0;opacity:0;animation:fadeIn .3s forwards;}
.boot-bar-wrap{width:320px;height:4px;background:rgba(255,105,180,.2);border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden;}
.boot-bar{height:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--pink),var(--pink2));width:0%;transition:width .3s ease;border-radius:4px;}
.boot-hint{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;color:var(--pink3);margin-top:1.5rem;opacity:.7;animation:blink 1.2s ease-in-out infinite;}

/* NAV */
nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;z-index:100;padding:.75rem 2rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;background:rgba(13,0,21,.85);backdrop-filter:blur(12px);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(228,0,124,.2);}
.nav-logo{font-family:'Pacifico',cursive;font-size:20px;color:var(--pink);text-shadow:0 0 15px rgba(228,0,124,.5);}
.nav-links{display:flex;gap:2rem;list-style:none;}
.nav-links a{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;color:var(--pink3);text-decoration:none;letter-spacing:.1em;transition:color .2s;position:relative;}
.nav-links a::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:-4px;left:0;width:0;height:1px;background:var(--pink);transition:width .3s;}
.nav-links a:hover{color:var(--pink);}
.nav-links a:hover::after{width:100%;}
.nav-clock{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;color:var(--pink2);opacity:.8;}

/* CANVAS estrellas */
#starsCanvas{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;z-index:0;pointer-events:none;}

/* HERO */
#hero{position:relative;min-height:100vh;display:flex;align-items:center;z-index:1;padding:5rem 4rem 3rem;}
.hero-left{flex:1;z-index:2;}
.hero-greeting{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:13px;color:var(--pink2);letter-spacing:.2em;margin-bottom:.5rem;opacity:0;animation:slideUp .6s .3s forwards;}
.hero-name{font-family:'Pacifico',cursive;font-size:clamp(36px,6vw,64px);color:var(--white);line-height:1.1;margin-bottom:.5rem;opacity:0;animation:slideUp .6s .5s forwards;}
.hero-name span{color:var(--pink);text-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(228,0,124,.5);}
.hero-role{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:16px;color:var(--pink3);margin-bottom:1.5rem;opacity:0;animation:slideUp .6s .7s forwards;}
.hero-role .cursor-type{border-right:2px solid var(--pink);animation:blink .7s infinite;}
.hero-desc{font-size:15px;color:rgba(255,179,217,.7);line-height:1.8;max-width:480px;margin-bottom:2rem;opacity:0;animation:slideUp .6s .9s forwards;}
.hero-btns{display:flex;gap:1rem;flex-wrap:wrap;opacity:0;animation:slideUp .6s 1.1s forwards;}
.btn-primary{background:var(--pink);color:white;border:none;padding:.75rem 1.75rem;border-radius:30px;font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .3s;text-decoration:none;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
.btn-primary:hover{background:var(--pink2);transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 8px 25px rgba(228,0,124,.4);}
.btn-outline{background:transparent;color:var(--pink3);border:1.5px solid var(--pink);padding:.75rem 1.75rem;border-radius:30px;font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .3s;text-decoration:none;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
.btn-outline:hover{background:rgba(228,0,124,.1);transform:translateY(-2px);}
.hero-right{position:absolute;right:0;bottom:0;height:95%;width:52%;z-index:1;}
.hero-img{height:100%;width:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:top center;mask-image:linear-gradient(to left,black 40%,transparent 100%),linear-gradient(to top,transparent 0%,black 15%);-webkit-mask-image:linear-gradient(to left,black 40%,transparent 100%),linear-gradient(to top,transparent 0%,black 15%);mask-composite:intersect;-webkit-mask-composite:source-in;animation:floatImg 5s ease-in-out infinite;}
.hero-space-bg{position:absolute;right:0;top:0;height:100%;width:60%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center;opacity:.35;mask-image:linear-gradient(to left,black 30%,transparent 90%);-webkit-mask-image:linear-gradient(to left,black 30%,transparent 90%);}

/* SCROLLING BADGES */
.badges-strip{position:relative;z-index:2;background:rgba(228,0,124,.08);border-top:1px solid rgba(228,0,124,.2);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(228,0,124,.2);padding:.6rem 0;overflow:hidden;}
.badges-track{display:flex;gap:2rem;animation:scrollBadges 20s linear infinite;white-space:nowrap;}
.badge-item{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;color:var(--pink3);display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:0 1rem;}

/* SECTIONS */
section{position:relative;z-index:2;padding:5rem 4rem;}
.section-label{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.2em;color:var(--pink);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:.5rem;}
.section-title{font-family:'Pacifico',cursive;font-size:36px;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:2.5rem;line-height:1.2;}
.section-title span{color:var(--pink);}

/* SOBRE MÍ */
#sobre{display:flex;gap:4rem;align-items:center;}
.sobre-text{flex:1;}
.sobre-text p{font-size:15px;color:rgba(255,179,217,.8);line-height:1.9;margin-bottom:1rem;}
.sobre-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1rem;margin-top:1.5rem;}
.stat-card{background:rgba(228,0,124,.08);border:1px solid rgba(228,0,124,.25);border-radius:14px;padding:1.25rem;text-align:center;}
.stat-num{font-family:'Pacifico',cursive;font-size:32px;color:var(--pink);display:block;}
.stat-lbl{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;color:var(--pink3);letter-spacing:.1em;margin-top:4px;}

/* SKILLS */
#skills{background:rgba(228,0,124,.04);}
.skills-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(140px,1fr));gap:1rem;}
.skill-card{background:rgba(255,105,180,.06);border:1px solid rgba(228,0,124,.2);border-radius:14px;padding:1.25rem 1rem;text-align:center;transition:all .3s;cursor:default;}
.skill-card:hover{background:rgba(228,0,124,.15);border-color:var(--pink);transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(228,0,124,.2);}
.skill-icon{font-size:28px;display:block;margin-bottom:.5rem;}
.skill-name{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;color:var(--pink3);}

/* PROYECTOS */
.proj-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(280px,1fr));gap:1.5rem;}
.proj-card{background:rgba(255,105,180,.05);border:1px solid rgba(228,0,124,.2);border-radius:18px;padding:1.5rem;transition:all .3s;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.proj-card::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--pink),var(--pink2));transform:scaleX(0);transition:transform .3s;transform-origin:left;}
.proj-card:hover{border-color:var(--pink);transform:translateY(-5px);box-shadow:0 16px 40px rgba(228,0,124,.2);}
.proj-card:hover::before{transform:scaleX(1);}
.proj-emoji{font-size:32px;margin-bottom:.75rem;display:block;}
.proj-title{font-size:16px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:.5rem;}
.proj-desc{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;color:rgba(255,179,217,.7);line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:1rem;}
.proj-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;}
.proj-tag{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;background:rgba(228,0,124,.15);border:1px solid rgba(228,0,124,.3);border-radius:20px;padding:2px 10px;color:var(--pink3);}
.proj-link{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;color:var(--pink);text-decoration:none;margin-top:1rem;transition:gap .2s;}
.proj-link:hover{gap:8px;}

/* CONTACTO */
#contacto{text-align:center;}
.contact-cards{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:1.5rem;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:2rem;}
.contact-card{background:rgba(228,0,124,.08);border:1px solid rgba(228,0,124,.25);border-radius:18px;padding:1.5rem 2rem;text-decoration:none;transition:all .3s;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:.5rem;min-width:160px;}
.contact-card:hover{background:rgba(228,0,124,.2);border-color:var(--pink);transform:translateY(-4px);}
.contact-icon{font-size:28px;}
.contact-label{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;color:var(--pink3);}
.contact-val{font-size:13px;color:var(--white);font-weight:600;}

/* FOOTER */
footer{text-align:center;padding:2rem;border-top:1px solid rgba(228,0,124,.15);font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,179,217,.4);z-index:2;position:relative;}

/* ANIMATIONS */
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{text-shadow:0 0 40px rgba(228,0,124,.6);}50%{text-shadow:0 0 60px rgba(228,0,124,1);}}
@keyframes blink{0%,100%{opacity:1;}50%{opacity:0;}}
@keyframes fadeIn{to{opacity:1;}}
@keyframes slideUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(20px);}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}}
@keyframes floatImg{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0);}50%{transform:translateY(-12px);}}
@keyframes scrollBadges{from{transform:translateX(0);}to{transform:translateX(-50%);}}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- CURSOR -->
<div class="cursor" id="cur"></div>
<div class="cursor-ring" id="curRing"></div>

<!-- BOOT SCREEN -->
<div id="boot">
  <div class="boot-logo">Jory.dev</div>
  <div class="boot-sub">✦ INICIANDO SISTEMA ✦</div>
  <div class="boot-log" id="bootLog"></div>
  <div class="boot-bar-wrap"><div class="boot-bar" id="bootBar"></div></div>
  <div class="boot-hint">[ presiona cualquier tecla para continuar ]</div>
</div>

<!-- CANVAS -->
<canvas id="starsCanvas"></canvas>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav>
  <div class="nav-logo">Jory ✦</div>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#sobre">sobre mí</a></li>
    <li><a href="#skills">skills</a></li>
    <li><a href="#proyectos">proyectos</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contacto">contacto</a></li>
  </ul>
  <div class="nav-clock" id="clock">00:00:00</div>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section id="hero">
  <div class="hero-left">
    <p class="hero-greeting">✦ hola mundo, soy</p>
    <h1 class="hero-name">Jory <span>Castro</span><br>Rodríguez</h1>
    <p class="hero-role">$ <span id="typeRole"></span><span class="cursor-type"> </span></p>
    <p class="hero-desc">Estudiante de DAM en segundo año, apasionada por construir cosas que funcionen de verdad. Desde sistemas de gestión hasta bots con IA — el código bien hecho siempre cuenta una historia.</p>
    <div class="hero-btns">
      <a href="#proyectos" class="btn-primary">🚀 ver proyectos</a>
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/jory-litsy-3754831b8" class="btn-outline" target="_blank">💼 LinkedIn</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <img class="hero-space-bg" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="">
  <img class="hero-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Jory programando">
</section>

<!-- BADGES STRIP -->
<div class="badges-strip">
  <div class="badges-track">
    <span class="badge-item">☕ Java</span>
    <span class="badge-item">🗄️ SQL</span>
    <span class="badge-item">🐍 Python</span>
    <span class="badge-item">📄 XML · XSLT</span>
    <span class="badge-item">🐋 Docker</span>
    <span class="badge-item">🔗 n8n</span>
    <span class="badge-item">🤖 IA aplicada</span>
    <span class="badge-item">🌱 DAM 2º año</span>
    <span class="badge-item">🚀 Dev Girl</span>
    <span class="badge-item">🌸 España</span>
    <span class="badge-item">☕ Java</span>
    <span class="badge-item">🗄️ SQL</span>
    <span class="badge-item">🐍 Python</span>
    <span class="badge-item">📄 XML · XSLT</span>
    <span class="badge-item">🐋 Docker</span>
    <span class="badge-item">🔗 n8n</span>
    <span class="badge-item">🤖 IA aplicada</span>
    <span class="badge-item">🌱 DAM 2º año</span>
    <span class="badge-item">🚀 Dev Girl</span>
    <span class="badge-item">🌸 España</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- SOBRE MÍ -->
<section id="sobre">
  <div class="sobre-text">
    <p class="section-label">// sobre mí</p>
    <h2 class="section-title">quien soy <span>✦</span></h2>
    <p>Soy Jory, estudiante de Desarrollo de Aplicaciones Multiplataforma en segundo año. Me apasiona crear software que resuelva problemas reales — desde aplicaciones de gestión hasta bots inteligentes.</p>
    <p>Cuando no estoy programando, estoy aprendiendo algo nuevo o soñando con proyectos que lleguen a las estrellas 🚀</p>
    <div class="sobre-stats">
      <div class="stat-card"><span class="stat-num">87</span><span class="stat-lbl">contribuciones</span></div>
      <div class="stat-card"><span class="stat-num">6</span><span class="stat-lbl">repositorios</span></div>
      <div class="stat-card"><span class="stat-num">2º</span><span class="stat-lbl">año DAM</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- SKILLS -->
<section id="skills">
  <p class="section-label">// tecnologías</p>
  <h2 class="section-title">mis <span>skills</span></h2>
  <div class="skills-grid">
    <div class="skill-card"><span class="skill-icon">☕</span><span class="skill-name">Java</span></div>
    <div class="skill-card"><span class="skill-icon">📄</span><span class="skill-name">XML / XSLT</span></div>
    <div class="skill-card"><span class="skill-icon">🗄️</span><span class="skill-name">SQL</span></div>
    <div class="skill-card"><span class="skill-icon">🐍</span><span class="skill-name">Python</span></div>
    <div class="skill-card"><span class="skill-icon">🐋</span><span class="skill-name">Docker</span></div>
    <div class="skill-card"><span class="skill-icon">🔗</span><span class="skill-name">n8n</span></div>
    <div class="skill-card"><span class="skill-icon">🗃️</span><span class="skill-name">MySQL</span></div>
    <div class="skill-card"><span class="skill-icon">🐙</span><span class="skill-name">Git</span></div>
    <div class="skill-card"><span class="skill-icon">🤖</span><span class="skill-name">IA aplicada</span></div>
    <div class="skill-card"><span class="skill-icon">☕</span><span class="skill-name">NetBeans</span></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PROYECTOS -->
<section id="proyectos">
  <p class="section-label">// proyectos</p>
  <h2 class="section-title">lo que he <span>construido</span></h2>
  <div class="proj-grid">
    <div class="proj-card">
      <span class="proj-emoji">🤖</span>
      <p class="proj-title">Bot Generador de Entornos Docker</p>
      <p class="proj-desc">Bot de Telegram con IA para generar, desplegar y gestionar entornos Docker automáticamente con n8n y OpenHands.</p>
      <div class="proj-tags"><span class="proj-tag">Python</span><span class="proj-tag">Docker</span><span class="proj-tag">IA</span><span class="proj-tag">n8n</span></div>
      <a href="https://github.com/JoryCastroRodriguez23/bot-generador-entornos-docker" class="proj-link" target="_blank">ver proyecto →</a>
    </div>
    <div class="proj-card">
      <span class="proj-emoji">🏨</span>
      <p class="proj-title">Sistema de Reserva de Hoteles</p>
      <p class="proj-desc">App Java Swing con MySQL para gestionar clientes, habitaciones, salones y reservas completas.</p>
      <div class="proj-tags"><span class="proj-tag">Java Swing</span><span class="proj-tag">MySQL</span><span class="proj-tag">JDBC</span></div>
      <a href="https://github.com/JoryCastroRodriguez23/Reserva-Hoteles-" class="proj-link" target="_blank">ver proyecto →</a>
    </div>
    <div class="proj-card">
      <span class="proj-emoji">🩺</span>
      <p class="proj-title">Consultorio de Pacientes</p>
      <p class="proj-desc">Sistema de gestión clínica con interfaz limpia y base de datos relacional bien estructurada.</p>
      <div class="proj-tags"><span class="proj-tag">Java</span><span class="proj-tag">SQL</span></div>
      <a href="https://github.com/JoryCastroRodriguez23/Consultorio_Pacientes" class="proj-link" target="_blank">ver proyecto →</a>
    </div>
    <div class="proj-card">
      <span class="proj-emoji">📄</span>
      <p class="proj-title">NetDocs GrupoJoryPatri</p>
      <p class="proj-desc">Proyecto colaborativo con XML y XSLT para gestión de documentación estructurada.</p>
      <div class="proj-tags"><span class="proj-tag">XML</span><span class="proj-tag">XSLT</span></div>
      <a href="https://github.com/JoryCastroRodriguez23/NetDocs-GrupoJoryPatri" class="proj-link" target="_blank">ver proyecto →</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CONTACTO -->
<section id="contacto">
  <p class="section-label">// contacto</p>
  <h2 class="section-title">hablemos <span>🌸</span></h2>
  <p style="color:rgba(255,179,217,.7);font-size:15px;max-width:500px;margin:0 auto;">¿Tienes algún proyecto en mente o quieres colaborar? ¡Escríbeme!</p>
  <div class="contact-cards">
    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/jory-litsy-3754831b8" class="contact-card" target="_blank">
      <span class="contact-icon">💼</span>
      <span class="contact-label">LinkedIn</span>
      <span class="contact-val">jory-litsy</span>
    </a>
    <a href="https://github.com/JoryCastroRodriguez23" class="contact-card" target="_blank">
      <span class="contact-icon">🐙</span>
      <span class="contact-label">GitHub</span>
      <span class="contact-val">JoryCastroRodriguez23</span>
    </a>
  </div>
</section>

<footer>
  <p>✦ Jory Castro Rodríguez · DAM · España · 2026 ✦</p>
  <p style="margin-top:6px;">"Como las estrellas, el buen código siempre brilla." 🌟</p>
</footer>

<script>
// CURSOR
const cur=document.getElementById('cur'),curRing=document.getElementById('curRing');
document.addEventListener('mousemove',e=>{cur.style.left=e.clientX+'px';cur.style.top=e.clientY+'px';curRing.style.left=e.clientX+'px';curRing.style.top=e.clientY+'px';});

// CLOCK
function updateClock(){const n=new Date();document.getElementById('clock').textContent=[n.getHours(),n.getMinutes(),n.getSeconds()].map(x=>String(x).padStart(2,'0')).join(':');}
updateClock();setInterval(updateClock,1000);

// BOOT
const logs=['> Iniciando Jory.dev OS v1.0...','> Cargando módulos: Java, Python, SQL...','> Conectando con el universo...','> Activando modo dev girl 🌸...','> Sistema listo ✦'];
const bootLog=document.getElementById('bootLog');
const bootBar=document.getElementById('bootBar');
let li=0;
function nextLog(){
  if(li<logs.length){
    const p=document.createElement('p');
    p.textContent=logs[li++];
    p.style.animationDelay='0s';
    bootLog.appendChild(p);
    bootBar.style.width=(li/logs.length*100)+'%';
    setTimeout(nextLog,500);
  }
}
nextLog();
function hideBoot(){document.getElementById('boot').classList.add('hidden');setTimeout(()=>document.getElementById('boot').remove(),900);}
document.addEventListener('keydown',hideBoot,{once:true});
document.addEventListener('click',hideBoot,{once:true});
setTimeout(hideBoot,4000);

// STARS CANVAS
const canvas=document.getElementById('starsCanvas');
const ctx=canvas.getContext('2d');
function resizeCanvas(){canvas.width=window.innerWidth;canvas.height=window.innerHeight;}
resizeCanvas();window.addEventListener('resize',resizeCanvas);
const stars=Array.from({length:200},()=>({x:Math.random(),y:Math.random(),r:Math.random()*1.8+.3,tw:Math.random()*Math.PI*2,spd:Math.random()*.4+.15,col:['white','#ffb3d9','#ff69b4','#d6006e','#c9b8ff'][Math.floor(Math.random()*5)]}));
const meteors=[];
function spawnMeteor(){meteors.push({x:Math.random()*.5*canvas.width,y:Math.random()*.4*canvas.height,len:Math.random()*100+50,spd:Math.random()*5+3,life:1,col:Math.random()>.5?'#ffb3d9':'white'});}
spawnMeteor();setInterval(spawnMeteor,2500);
let t=0;
function drawStars(){
  t+=.007;canvas.width=canvas.width;
  ctx.clearRect(0,0,canvas.width,canvas.height);
  stars.forEach(s=>{const tw=.25+.75*Math.sin(t*s.spd+s.tw);ctx.globalAlpha=tw;ctx.fillStyle=s.col;ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(s.x*canvas.width,s.y*canvas.height,s.r,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();});
  meteors.forEach((m,i)=>{
    ctx.globalAlpha=m.life*.85;
    const g=ctx.createLinearGradient(m.x,m.y,m.x-m.len*.8,m.y-m.len*.8);
    g.addColorStop(0,m.col);g.addColorStop(1,'transparent');
    ctx.strokeStyle=g;ctx.lineWidth=2;ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(m.x,m.y);ctx.lineTo(m.x-m.len*.8,m.y-m.len*.8);ctx.stroke();
    ctx.fillStyle='white';ctx.globalAlpha=m.life;ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(m.x,m.y,2.5,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();
    m.x+=m.spd*1.4;m.y+=m.spd*1.1;m.life-=.011;if(m.life<=0)meteors.splice(i,1);
  });
  ctx.globalAlpha=1;requestAnimationFrame(drawStars);
}
drawStars();

// TYPING EFFECT
const roles=['Estudiante de DAM 🎓','Dev Girl 🌸','Java Developer ☕','Bot Creator 🤖','Exploradora del universo 🚀'];
let ri=0,ci=0,del=false;
const typeEl=document.getElementById('typeRole');
function type(){
  const word=roles[ri];
  if(!del){typeEl.textContent=word.slice(0,++ci);if(ci===word.length){del=true;setTimeout(type,1800);return;}}
  else{typeEl.textContent=word.slice(0,--ci);if(ci===0){del=false;ri=(ri+1)%roles.length;}}
  setTimeout(type,del?60:100);
}
type();
</script>
</body>
</html>
